studyName: Clear Cell Endometrial Cancer Exome Sequencing Study

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, histological type, primary or metastatic tumor, primary tumor location, tumor stage, and sequencing center of participants with clear cell endometrial tumors and involved in the "Exome Sequencing of Clear Cell Endometrial Tumors and Paired Non-tumor Samples" project.

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with clear cell endometrial tumors and involved in the "Exome Sequencing of Clear Cell Endometrial Tumors and Paired Non-tumor Samples" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case or control status of the subjects

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with clear cell endometrial tumors and involved in the "Exome Sequencing of Clear Cell Endometrial Tumors and Paired Non-tumor Samples" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Ind: Sample(s) were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf) with individual SNP genotypes; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID and sex of participants with clear cell endometrial tumors and involved in the "Exome Sequencing of Clear Cell Endometrial Tumors and Paired Non-tumor Samples" project.
